connection.title: Connection Settings *
connection.restart_note: * Changing connection settings will restart the device.

wifi.no_scan_message: Click "Scan available networks" to see WiFi networks

display.title: Display Settings
display.show_weather: Show weather forecast icon and moon phase

location.title: Location Settings *
location.timezone_placeholder: Enter Timezone in POSIX format ONLY if automatic detection doesn't work
location.help_text: You can find a list of POSIX timezones here. Lat/Lon only affect weather data.
location.restart_note: * Changing location settings will restart the device.

brightness.title: Projection brightness settings
brightness.sensitivity_help: Sensitivity helps avoid unwanted brightness changes. Dark = Threshold - Sensitivity, Bright = Threshold + Sensitivity.

message.title: Scrolling Message
message.token_ha: Fetch settings from Home Assistant (needs enabled integration)
message.token_stock: Fetch stock price quote (needs enabled stock integration with Finnhub.io)
message.token_cgm_glucose: Latest glucose reading from your CGM device, formatted, e.g. 157 mg/dl (+3 @ 12:01). (needs active CGM integration)
message.tokens_note: Note: Tokens are case-sensitive and must be enclosed in square brackets.
message.default_message: Default message: [device].local/ [greeting] [day], [date] [mon], now [temp] today [high]-[low], hum. [hum], sun [rise]-[set]

support.title: Share information with support
support.help_text: If you need any support, please share the information above with us. Click "send email" to send us a message; if that doesn't work, copy the information to your clipboard and send it via email to support@buyfrixos.com.

ha.title: Home Assistant
ha.kb_help: For setup instructions, visit this KB article.

stock.title: Stock Quote Service (via Finnhub.io)
stock.kb_help: For setup instructions, visit this KB article.

glucose_monitors.title: Glucose Monitoring
glucose_monitors.kb_help: For setup instructions, visit this KB article.

alternate_time_cgm.title: Alternate time/CGM
alternate_time_cgm.description: Alternate projection display between time and CGM measurements

update.title: Upload Firmware / Files
update.auto_check: Your device checks and installs new firmware automatically.
update.manual_info: If you have been instructed by our support to manually install a specific firmware version, or if you are looking to upload e.g. a custom font, you can do this here.
update.select_file: Select a firmware file (.bin) or other file to upload to the device.
update.firmware_step1: Click the "Choose File" button and select the firmware file (.bin) from your computer.
update.firmware_step2: Click the "Upload Firmware" button to start the update process.
update.firmware_step3: Wait for the update to complete. Do not power off or disconnect the device during the update.
update.firmware_step4: The device will automatically restart after the update is complete.
update.firmware_warning: Warning: Uploading incorrect firmware may cause the device to malfunction. Make sure to use the correct firmware for your device.
update.file_step1: Click the "Choose File" button and select the file (e.g. user-font.jpg) from your computer.
update.file_step2: Click the "Upload Firmware" button to start the upload process.
update.file_step3: Wait for the upload to complete. Do not power off or disconnect the device during the upload.
update.file_step4: You can now upload another file or close this window.

restart.title: Device Reset
restart.description: Use this option to restart your Frixos device.
restart.confirm_message: Are you sure you want to restart the device?
restart.unavailable_message: The device will become temporarily unavailable during restart.

messages.correct_form_errors: Please correct the highlighted fields before submitting
messages.network_settings_changed: Network settings changed. Device will restart...
messages.error_saving_unknown: Error saving settings. Check console for details.
messages.select_firmware_file: Please select a firmware file or other file to upload
messages.uploading_file: Uploading file... Do not power off the device.
messages.firmware_update_success: Firmware update successful! Device is rebooting...
messages.device_restarting: Device is restarting. This page will refresh in
messages.error_reset_connection: Error sending reset command: Connection lost
messages.correct_form_before_save: Please correct the form errors before saving.
messages.dexcom_credentials_required: username and password are required when enabled
messages.dexcom_refresh_range: refresh interval must be between 1 and 60 minutes
messages.glucose_high_range: High glucose threshold must be between 1 and 400 mg/dL
messages.glucose_low_range: Low glucose threshold must be between 1 and 400 mg/dL
messages.glucose_low_less_than_high: Low glucose threshold must be less than high threshold
messages.cgm_only_one: Only one CGM source (Dexcom, FreeStyle Libre, or Nightscout URL) can be enabled at a time.
messages.freestyle_credentials_required: Libre username and password are required when enabled
messages.freestyle_refresh_range: Libre refresh interval must be between 1 and 60 minutes
